prompt_text:
{
  "character_id": "char_01",
  "identity_lock_en": "a wise 65-year-old Asian Zen scholar with a refined rectangular face, deeply set contemplative eyes, and a weathered complexion showing wisdom lines",
  "display_name": "Zen Scholar",
  "role": "main",
  "face_design_en": "elongated oval face, high prominent cheekbones, thin focused lips, a straight narrow nose, and thick salt-and-pepper eyebrows over warm brown eyes",
  "hair_design_en": "long silver-white hair tied into a tight high bun, clean-shaven hairline, a wispy long white goatee reaching mid-chest, natural hair texture",
  "body_design_en": "lean and slender build, height 175cm, perfectly upright poised posture, thin neck, agile silhouette suggesting disciplined movement",
  "wardrobe_en": "traditional layered charcoal grey silk robes, a wide black hemp obi belt, simple white linen undergarments visible at the collar, wooden geta sandals",
  "color_palette_en": "monochromatic palette of charcoal grey, stark white, ebony black, and aged parchment skin tones",
  "reference_sheet_prompt_en": "landscape character reference sheet, four-angle turnaround, front left right back, a wise Zen scholar in grey robes, full-body concept sheet, clean white background, high-detail cinematic lighting, 8k resolution",
  "turnaround_prompts_en": {
    "front": "full-body front view of a Zen scholar in charcoal grey robes, hands tucked in sleeves, neutral expression, white background",
    "left": "left profile full-body view of a Zen scholar, silver bun visible, layered silk robes draped naturally, white background",
    "right": "right profile full-body view of a Zen scholar, showing lean silhouette and long white goatee, white background",
    "back": "full-body back view of a Zen scholar, showing the knot of the high bun and the flowing charcoal grey robes, white background"
  }
}
